name: coding-agent-benchmark
description: Benchmarks for evaluating coding agent behavior.

scripts.eval:smoke-test: npx tsx src/codingAgentBenchmark.eval.ts evaluation run --task codingAgent --sample-size 1 --model smoke-test --dataset app-development
scripts.eval:claude-code-base: npx tsx src/codingAgentBenchmark.eval.ts evaluation run --task codingAgent  --model claude-code-baseline --dataset app-development
scripts.eval:claude-code-superpowers: npx tsx src/codingAgentBenchmark.eval.ts evaluation run --task codingAgent  --model claude-code-superpowers --dataset app-development
scripts.eval:claude-code-superpowers-fork: npx tsx src/codingAgentBenchmark.eval.ts evaluation run --task codingAgent  --model claude-code-superpowers-fork --dataset app-development
scripts.eval:claude-code-claude-md: npx tsx src/codingAgentBenchmark.eval.ts evaluation run --task codingAgent  --model claude-code-claude-md --dataset app-development
